## CLAIMS CODING SUMMARY
**Patient:** Tamera164 Wisozk929 | **DOB:** 1980-02-03 | **Payer:** Blue Cross Blue Shield
**Encounter Date:** 2024-02-18
**Coded by:** Claims AI Agent | **Status:** REQUIRES REVIEW

### Billable Codes
| CPT | Description | Modifier | Status | Evidence |
|-----|-------------|----------|--------|----------|
| 99396 | Preventive medicine E/M, established patient, 40-64 years | | REQUIRES REVIEW | Payer requirements for 99396. Justification: "No complaints." and "assessment of health and social care needs (procedure)" and "Tamera164 is a 44 year-old hispanic white female." |
| 90686 | Influenza virus vaccine, quadrivalent (IIV4), preservative free, 0.5mL dosage, for intramuscular use | | REQUIRES REVIEW | Payer requirements for 90686. Justification: "Patient was given the following immunizations: influenza, seasonal, injectable, preservative free." |
| 90471 | Immunization administration (includes percutaneous, intradermal, subcutaneous, or intramuscular injections); one vaccine | | UNVERIFIED | Implied by the administration of 90686 as per payer requirements. |
| 96127 | Brief emotional/behavioral assessment, with scoring and documentation, per standardized instrument | | REQUIRES REVIEW | Payer requirements for 96127. Justification: "depression screening (procedure)" and "patient health questionnaire 2 item (phq-2) [reported]". |
| 99408 | Alcohol and/or substance (other than tobacco) abuse structured screening (eg, AUDIT, DAST, ASSIST), and brief intervention (eg, FRAMES), 15-30 minutes | | UNVERIFIED | Justification: "assessment of substance use (procedure)", "screening for drug abuse (procedure)", and "drug abuse screening test-10 [dast-10]". |

### Hard Stops (Removed from Claim)
None

### Documentation Flags
*   **99396:** Documentation does not reflect comprehensive preventive exam. Clinical note must evidence comprehensive history, physical exam, and counseling/anticipatory guidance.
*   **90686:** Vaccine administration code (90471) not billed alongside 90686. (Note: 90471 has been added, but this flag indicates the original documentation gap).
*   **96127:** No scoring documentation in clinical note. PHQ-2 score must be recorded.

### Payer-Specific Notes
*   **99396:** Modifier 59 is REQUIRED and AUTO-APPLY if 96127 is billed more than once on the same date of service, specifically when depression screening (96127) is billed more than once. (From GetPayerRequirements for 99396)
*   **96127:** If 96127 is billed more than once on the same date without modifier 59 on the second unit, modifier 59 is required and will be auto-applied to the second instance of 96127. (From GetPayerRequirements for 96127)
Please code the encounter for patient ID: c6c1ecd9-c786-4fe7-8e2d-0c95dee4117a. Produce a complete ClaimAuditLog with confidence scores and payer-specific evidence for all codes.

2024-02-18

# Chief Complaint
No complaints.

# History of Present Illness
Tamera164 is a 44 year-old hispanic white female. Patient has a history of gingival disease (disorder), medication review due (situation), not in labor force (finding), full-time employment (finding), gingivitis (disorder), stress (finding), social isolation (finding).

# Social History
Patient is married. Patient has never smoked.
 Patient identifies as heterosexual.

Patient comes from a high socioeconomic background.
 Patient is a college graduate.
Patient currently has Blue Cross Blue Shield.

# Allergies
No Known Allergies.

# Medications
sodium fluoride 0.0272 mg/mg oral gel

# Assessment and Plan
Patient is presenting with part-time employment (finding), misuses drugs (finding). 


## Plan
Patient was given the following immunizations: influenza, seasonal, injectable, preservative free. 
The following procedures were conducted:
- assessment of health and social care needs (procedure)
- depression screening (procedure)
- depression screening (procedure)
- assessment of substance use (procedure)
- screening for drug abuse (procedure)
The following lab reports were completed:
- patient health questionnaire 2 item (phq-2) [reported]
- drug abuse screening test-10 [dast-10]

content.text:
=== PAYER REQUIREMENTS: CPT 99396 | Payer: Blue Cross Blue Shield ===
Description: Preventive medicine visit, established patient, age 40-64
Category: preventive_medicine
Prior Auth Required: No

--- ELIGIBILITY ---
Eligible: Age range 40–64, any, established patient
Frequency: once_per_calendar_year

--- MODIFIERS ---
Modifier 25 [OPTIONAL]
  Condition: A separate problem-oriented E&M service is documented and medically necessary on the same date as the preventive visit
Modifier 59 [REQUIRED] [AUTO-APPLY]
  Condition: A procedure or service is distinct and independent from other services performed on the same day, specifically when depression screening (96127) is billed more than once

--- DENIAL TRIGGERS ---
🔴 HIGH | HARD_STOP | Billed more than once per calendar year for same patient
  Action: Remove duplicate. Only one preventive visit per year is reimbursable under CMS.
🔴 HIGH | HARD_STOP | Patient age does not fall within 40-64 range
  Action: Use 99395 for ages 18-39 or 99397 for ages 65+. Verify patient DOB from FHIR demographics.
🔴 HIGH | HARD_STOP | Patient listed as new patient — should be 99386 for new patients age 40-64
  Action: Confirm established vs new patient status from FHIR encounter history.
🔴 HIGH | MODIFIER_REQUIRED | Depression screening (96127) billed twice on same date without modifier 59
  Action: Auto-apply modifier 59 to second 96127 instance. Cite BCBS Modifier 59 Policy if payer is BCBS.
🟡 MEDIUM | DOCUMENTATION_GAP | Documentation does not reflect comprehensive preventive exam
  Action: Flag for human review. Clinical note must evidence comprehensive history, physical exam, and counseling/anticipatory guidance.

--- PAYER-SPECIFIC EVIDENCE ---
No payer-specific PDF evidence found for Blue Cross Blue Shield. Add Blue Cross Blue Shield policy PDFs to the pdfs/ directory and re-run ingest.ts.
--- COMMONLY BILLED WITH ---
90686, 90714, 96127, 99420

--- NOTES ---
Primary code for Tamera's encounter. Age 42, established patient, BCBS. Expect 96127 x2 — modifier 59 required.

=== PAYER REQUIREMENTS: CPT 90686 | Payer: Blue Cross Blue Shield ===
Description: Influenza virus vaccine, quadrivalent (IIV4), preservative free, 0.5mL dosage, for intramuscular use
Category: immunization
Prior Auth Required: No

--- ELIGIBILITY ---
Eligible: Age range 3–∞, any, any patient
Frequency: once_per_influenza_season

--- MODIFIERS ---
Modifier SB [OPTIONAL]
  Condition: Vaccine administered by non-physician provider in specific payer contexts

--- DENIAL TRIGGERS ---
🔴 HIGH | HARD_STOP | Billed more than once in same influenza season
  Action: Remove duplicate. One influenza vaccine per season unless documented medical necessity.
🔴 HIGH | HARD_STOP | Wrong vaccine code for patient age or dosage
  Action: Verify dosage from clinical note. 90685 is for 0.5mL preservative-free alternative. Confirm exact product administered.
🟡 MEDIUM | DOCUMENTATION_GAP | Vaccine administration code (90471) not billed alongside 90686
  Action: Flag for human review. 90471 (first vaccine admin) must accompany 90686. Without it, reimbursement for administration is lost.

--- PAYER-SPECIFIC EVIDENCE ---
No payer-specific PDF evidence found for Blue Cross Blue Shield. Add Blue Cross Blue Shield policy PDFs to the pdfs/ directory and re-run ingest.ts.
--- COMMONLY BILLED WITH ---
90471, 99396

--- NOTES ---
Tamera received influenza seasonal injectable preservative free. Maps to 90686. Must pair with 90471.

=== PAYER REQUIREMENTS: CPT 96127 | Payer: Blue Cross Blue Shield ===
Description: Brief emotional/behavioral assessment with scoring and documentation
Category: behavioral_health_screening
Prior Auth Required: No

--- ELIGIBILITY ---
Eligible: Age range 0–∞, any, any patient
Frequency: up_to_2x_per_encounter_with_modifier

--- MODIFIERS ---
Modifier 59 [REQUIRED] [AUTO-APPLY]
  Condition: 96127 is billed more than once on the same date of service

--- DENIAL TRIGGERS ---
🔴 HIGH | MODIFIER_REQUIRED | Billed more than once on same date without modifier 59 on second unit
  Action: Auto-apply modifier 59 to second instance of 96127. Tamera's note documents depression screening x2 — this trigger is expected to fire.
🟡 MEDIUM | DOCUMENTATION_GAP | No scoring documentation in clinical note
  Action: Flag for human review. PHQ-2 score must be recorded. Tamera's note lists PHQ-2 [reported] — verify score is captured.
🟡 MEDIUM | DOCUMENTATION_GAP | Billed without a corresponding preventive or E&M code
  Action: 96127 is typically an add-on to a primary E&M or preventive visit. Confirm 99396 is present on the same claim.

--- PAYER-SPECIFIC EVIDENCE ---
No payer-specific PDF evidence found for Blue Cross Blue Shield. Add Blue Cross Blue Shield policy PDFs to the pdfs/ directory and re-run ingest.ts.
--- COMMONLY BILLED WITH ---
99396, 99420

--- NOTES ---
Key code for the Modifier 59 demo. Tamera has depression screening x2 on same date. Second instance requires modifier 59. This is the centerpiece denial predictor scenario.
CPT code 99408 is not in the CMS rules database. Currently supported codes: 90686, 90714, 96127, 99396, 99420. Add the code to rules/cms_rules.json to enable denial prediction.
CPT code 90471 is not in the CMS rules database. Currently supported codes: 90686, 90714, 96127, 99396, 99420. Add the code to rules/cms_rules.json to enable denial prediction.
